description_long: This factory building features a sprawling, low-rise layout with multiple interconnected sections, including a large open yard area and a prominent rectangular pool or water treatment basin. The structure is composed of several blocky, utilitarian volumes, with visible tanks and storage silos clustered on one side, and a fenced perimeter enclosing the site. The roof is mostly flat, with some mechanical equipment and vents visible, suggesting industrial operations. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, primarily gray and beige, with some blue accents around the water features. There are no large decorative elements, emphasizing function over form, and the site includes various access points and operational zones typical of a modern industrial facility.
description: A large, flat-roofed factory building with storage tanks, a water basin, and mechanical rooftop equipment, finished in neutral industrial colors.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the building with clustered storage tanks, a fenced yard, and the water basin visible to the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the main entrance area and the full expanse of the water basin are visible, along with some rooftop machinery.
description_view_2: This side shows the water basin in the foreground, with the storage tanks and main building mass receding into the background.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the storage tank area and the rear of the building, with the water basin and mechanical features also visible.
